title: WebFinger: return 404 not 400 for non-acct: URIs
description: Per RFC 7033, WebFinger queries with non-acct: schemes (https:, mailto:) must get 404 Not Found, not 400 Bad Request. FediTest catches this. Check Broadside's WebFinger handler.
notes: CONFIRMED: src/server.rs:256 returns StatusCode::BAD_REQUEST for non-acct: URIs. Fix: change to StatusCode::NOT_FOUND and update error message to 'resource not found'. Also add integration test for non-acct: URI expecting 404.
close_reason: Fixed: src/server.rs:256 now returns 404 Not Found instead of 400 Bad Request for non-acct: URI schemes. Added integration test test_webfinger_non_acct_uri. All 13 tests passing.
